title: Straame Home | Interior Dehumidifier | Helps Prevent Damp, Mildew, Mould and Condensation | Long Lasting | Hydrophilic Crystals | Ideal for Any Room | (Interior, 5)
features: HYDROPHILLIC CRYSTALS - These help absorb any moisture from the air which helps to prevent any dampness in your rooms that may cause unwanted odours. This is a great way to keep your home smelling clean and fresh and to reduce the risk of any damp, Mildew, Mould or Condensation.

REMOVES DAMPNESS FROM THE AIR - These dehumidifiers have been designed to remove any dampness from the air, this is ideal for any room in the house and it is a great product to have to reduce the risk of causing any damage at home

IDEAL FOR ANY ROOM - They are ideal for any room in your home including the bathroom, bedroom, living room, kitchen and even your garage. Not only that, they are even beneficial to have at work in an office or staff room to keep the risk of any dampness or condensation to an absolute minimum!

EASY TO USE - All's you need to do is simply remove the blue lid, peel off the cover and then replace the lid on ready to start using! Quick and beneficial to your home and a great product to use and have to keep your house safe from any mould or dampness. Multiple pack sizes are available to ensure that you are getting the best quantity suited to your home

LONG LASTING - Not only are these cos effective but they are also long lasting so you know that you are getting a great product! The dehumidifiers will last anything from 4 to 6 weeks which is great as you know you are getting the use out of your dehumidifier that is also benefiting you!
